codeReview.summary: Pass: this fix resolves the blocking findings from `async-quicklinks-loading` and `flaky-prefetch-test-fix`. `crates/photoncast/src/main.rs` no longer blocks on `storage.load_all()` when `open_manage_quicklinks_window()` creates the manage/browse quicklinks window, and the only two helper call sites in `crates/photoncast/src/event_loop.rs` still repopulate that window asynchronously after opening it. The two prefetch tests now explicitly accept only `Running`, `Completed`, or `Failed`, so they no longer mask `Idle` or `Cancelled` states.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `rust-fix-worker` skill still requires a failing-test red phase and full-workspace `cargo test --workspace -- --test-threads=6`, but this fix transcript skipped the red phase and relied on the mission-approved `--lib` suite while still reporting `followedProcedure: true` with no deviations. The skill procedure and adherence signal remain misaligned with mission reality.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Current transcript for session `5abe2568-b141-42c0-8647-264639734016` shows direct edits to `crates/photoncast/src/main.rs` and `crates/photoncast-core/src/search/spotlight/prefetch.rs` without a preceding failing test run, and validation uses `cargo test --workspace --lib -- --test-threads=6`; `.factory/skills/rust-fix-worker/SKILL.md` step 3 requires a failing test first and step 7 requires full-workspace tests, while the handoff reports `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` and `deviations: []`.

summary: Pass: `async-quicklinks-loading` is fixed because `open_manage_quicklinks_window()` no longer performs the hidden quicklinks `block_on()` before showing the window, and `flaky-prefetch-test-fix` is fixed because both tests now reject `Idle`/`Cancelled` instead of accepting any non-Idle state. I did not find a new blocking regression in the reviewed diff.
